---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
 library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
Blood_count <- read_excel("Blood_count.xlsx")
```

```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `total_cell` = `[Cells] c/ml`
  )
```

```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `wbc%` = `Percent wbc`
  )
```

```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `Shark_Id` = `Sharks-Id`
  )
```

```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    esr        = `ESR (mm/h)`
  )
```

```{r}
Blood_data_clean <- Blood_count %>%
  select(
    Groupe,
    Shark_Id,
    Sex,
    week,
    total_cell, 
    Eggs,
    `wbc%`,
    esr
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(total_cell) & 
    !is.na(Groupe) & 
    !is.na(week)
)
```

```{r}
cat("Original rows:", nrow(Blood_count), "\n")
cat("Cleaned rows:", nrow(Blood_data_clean), "\n")
head(Blood_data_clean)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```
```{r}
Blood_data_clean <- Blood_data_clean %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe = as.factor(Groupe),
    week = as.factor(week),
    `wbc%` = as.numeric(`wbc%`)
  )
```

```{r}
# Ensure numeric column
Blood_data_clean$wbc <- as.numeric(Blood_data_clean$`wbc%`)

# Calculate mean
mean_wbc <- aggregate(wbc ~ Groupe + week, data = Blood_data_clean, FUN = mean)

# Calculate SD
sd_wbc <- aggregate(wbc ~ Groupe + week, data = Blood_data_clean, FUN = sd)

# Combine into one summary dataframe
Blood_summary <- merge(mean_wbc, sd_wbc, by = c("Groupe", "week"))
colnames(Blood_summary) <- c("Groupe", "week", "mean_wbc", "sd_wbc")

# Inspect
print(Blood_summary)

```

```{r}
ggplot(Blood_summary, aes(x = factor(week), y = mean_wbc, fill = Groupe)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_wbc - sd_wbc, ymax = mean_wbc + sd_wbc),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Mean WBC% per Group Across Weeks",
       x = "Week",
       y = "WBC (%)") +
  theme_minimal()

```
